answers: Creatine is one of the most researched and proven supplements for improving strength, power, and muscle mass. It works by increasing phosphocreatine stores in muscles, helping produce more ATP for energy during exercise.
Take 3-5g of creatine monohydrate daily. A loading phase (20g/day for 5-7 days) can saturate muscles faster but isn't necessary. Take it consistently at any time of day with water.

Creatine monohydrate is safe for most healthy adults when taken at recommended doses (3-5g/day). It may cause minor water retention initially. Stay well hydrated while using it. Those with kidney issues should consult a doctor first.
